# NearMirror

> NearMirror is a native desktop app for macOS, Windows, and Linux that mirrors and controls Android devices over USB or Wi‑Fi (ADB-based). Use this file as a curated entry point for documentation, product facts, and policies.

## Canonical summary (preferred for agents)

For a concise, version-stable fact list with pointers to authoritative pages, start here:

- https://nearmirror.com/ai-facts

## Product

- https://nearmirror.com/
- https://nearmirror.com/docs/installation

## Documentation

- https://nearmirror.com/docs/ (product overview — doc root)
- https://nearmirror.com/docs/getting-started
- https://nearmirror.com/docs/connecting-devices
- https://nearmirror.com/docs/developer-options

## Blog

- https://nearmirror.com/blog

## Legal and contact

- https://nearmirror.com/legal
- https://nearmirror.com/about
- https://nearmirror.com/contact
